prompt_INIT_CONFIG_HERE_ANYWAY.message: Startalize config file halkan si kastaba ha ahaatee

prompt_KEYS_TO_IGNORE.message: Gali furaha(yada) si aad iskaga indha tirto (comma-soocday, ama gasho haddii la sameeyo)

log_OVERWRITING_CONFIG_AT.message: Previous articleXildhibaano ka tirsan Baarlamaanka oo maanta kulan ku yeeshay Muqdisho

log_NO_NEW_KEYS_ADDED.message: Ma jiro furayaal cusub oo lagu daray (dhammaan hadda jira)

log_ALL_JSON_UPDATED.message: Dhammaan faylasha JSON si guul leh ayaa loo cusbooneysiiyay

log_TO_CREATE_DEFAULT_CONFIG.message: si aad u abuurto faylka qaabeynta default

tip_FOR_MORE_HELP_VISIT.message: Si aad u hesho caawimaad dheeraad ah, booqo

tip_MOVE_CONFIG_TO_ROOT.message: U guur faylka si aad xidid uga dhigto mashruuca aad rabto inaad ku isticmaasho

tip_IT_HAS_VALID_JSON.message: waxaa ku jira JSON ansax ah

tip_USE_A_VPN.message: Isticmaal VPN si aad dib ugu dejiso API throttling

warn_DIR_NOT_FOUND.message: Ma awoodo in la helo tusaha

warn_NO_PROJECT_ROOT_FOUND.message: Ma jiro xidid mashruuc la ogaaday

warn_NO_LONGER_HAS_ANY_EFFECT.message: mar dambe ma laha wax saameyn ah.

err_EN_LOC_NOT_FOUND_AT.message: Degaanka ingiriiska oo aan laga helin

help_LOCALES_DIR.message: Magaca faylka oo ay ku jiraan faylasha maxalliga ah (default: "_locales")

help_TARGET_LANGS.message: Luqadaha loo turjumo (tusaale ahaan "es,fr") (default: dhammaan 100+ goobaha la taageeray)

help_KEYS.message: Fureyaasha si aad u tarjunto (tusaale ahaan "app_desc, err_NOT_FOUND") (default: oo dhan laga helay furayaasha src maqan faylasha bartilmaameedka)

help_EXCLUDE_KEYS.message: Fureyaasha in la iska indhatiro (tusaale ahaan "app_NAME,author")

help_INIT.message: Abuur .translate-msgs.config.json5 file si loo keydiyo fursadaha default

help_FORCE.message: Xoog overwrite file config jira marka la isticmaalayo init

help_NO_WIZARD.message: Jooji dhiirigelinta is-dhexgalka inta lagu jiro bilowga
